name: tool-use-architecture
description: Tool-use system: 4 modules (tools.py, tool_parser.py, tool_selector.py, tool_executor.py), 6 core tools, Hermes XML wire format, 3-tier safety, session integration with tool loop.

name: jang-vmlx-routing
description: Detect JANG checkpoints via jang_config.json, label them as JANG/vMLX, and route them to a VMLXBackend that launches local 'vmlx serve'; keep chat_template.jinja during safetensors downloads and disable HF_HUB_DISABLE_XET around snapshot_download for large Hugging Face pulls.
